query: SHOW CREATE TABLE audio_content; SHOW CREATE TABLE qumus_core_policies;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zpoeP3x1cmc7iMR.f2a79e44485f --database eSHiAmKDzW4pqcyH7Ttb7c --execute SHOW CREATE TABLE audio_content; SHOW CREATE TABLE qumus_core_policies;
messages: `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
`updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
stdout:
Table	Create Table
audio_content	CREATE TABLE `audio_content` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `title` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `artist` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `album` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `genre` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `duration` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `file_url` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `cover_url` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `type` enum('music','podcast','audiobook','ambient','frequency') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'music',
  `is_public` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `play_count` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `is_favorited` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `metadata` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
Table	Create Table
qumus_core_policies	CREATE TABLE `qumus_core_policies` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `category` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `rules` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `priority` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
